metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent that generates a sales offer artifact from a chaotic multi-runtime input, using the compiler_lens to enforce governance and validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent that generates a sales offer artifact from a chaotic multi-runtime input, using the compiler_lens to enforce governance and validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Agent accepts chaotic input and produces a valid sales_offer artifact.; Artifact includes explicit validation gates.; Compiled intent contains all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.; No hallucinated or unverified content from missing context.; Agent logs or flags unresolved ambiguities for human review.

in_scope.item: The agent must accept a raw intent with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria; parse and normalize it; produce a structured sales_offer artifact with explicit validation gates; and output a compiled SR8 directive with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent accepts chaotic input and produces a valid sales_offer artifact.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Compiled intent contains all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: No hallucinated or unverified content from missing context.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Agent logs or flags unresolved ambiguities for human review.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

execution_laws.item: Must operate within the SR8 Sovereign Standard framework.
Must use the compiler_lens for governance and validation.
Must not assume complete or consistent input.
Must produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

implementation_contract.item: The agent must accept a raw intent with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria; parse and normalize it; produce a structured sales_offer artifact with explicit validation gates; and output a compiled SR8 directive with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.

verification_contract.item: Agent accepts chaotic input and produces a valid sales_offer artifact.
Compiled intent contains all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
No hallucinated or unverified content from missing context.
Agent logs or flags unresolved ambiguities for human review.

receipt_contract.item: compiled_intent: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: string; Success Criteria: string; Output Contract: object

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
